subject: Cloud Computing
title: GitOps: Infrastructure as Code 2.0
description: One-minute skill: GitOps: Infrastructure as Code 2.0.

hook.text: What if your Git repository was the single source of truth for all infrastructure? Commit to deploy. Revert to rollback.

buildup.text: GitOps treats infrastructure definitions like application code: versioned, reviewed, and automatically reconciled.

discovery.text: Tools like ArgoCD and Flux continuously sync your cluster state with your Git repo. Drift is detected and corrected.

twist.text: GitOps makes audit trails automatic. Every change is a Git commit with a timestamp, author, and approval record.

climax.text: GitOps is becoming the cloud-native standard. It unifies deployment, rollback, and compliance in a single workflow.

punchline.text: Git commit to deploy. Git revert to rollback. That simple.

quiz.question: How does GitOps improve infrastructure management?
options: It uses Git as the single source of truth, with automatic sync and built-in audit trails
It eliminates the need for any version control system
It requires all changes to be made directly in the cloud console
